name: discord
tagline: ClawHub (80★): Use when you need to control Discord from Clawdbot via the discord tool: send messages, react, post or upload stickers, uplo
verdict: No guidance anywhere for what happens when an upload exceeds size/format limits, a moderation action lacks permission, or an ID lookup fails - all real failure modes for a skill this dependent on the Discord API. It also lacks scope-exclusion language and any version tracking.

highlights.summary: Multiple failure-prone external-API steps (uploads with size/format constraints, permission-gated moderation actions, message/channel ID lookups) are documented with no guidance an
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
